title: NerdPack Essentials
description: Small QoL additions and optimizations at the core of NerdPack. For anyone who doesn’t need massive features, only a couple of additions to make life easier.
body: **A compilation of optimizations and QoL mods to make Minecraft just that much better!** ### Updated for 1.20.1! **Updated back to fabric, better for compatibility and mod use.** This is the minimalistic version of NerdPack, which you can find [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nerdpack). This modpack adds very few large, game-changing features, but is a great place to start if you are interested in making Minecraft feel a lot more optimized. This modpack may be updated to the latest version as necessary. **FULLY VANILLA SERVER COMPATIBLE!**
